request.messages: [redacted: candidate evidence omitted from raw judge artifact]

message.reasoning_content:
We are asked to validate extracted ASHRAE Guideline 36 items. Need to check each candidate if it is useful, grounded operational knowledge. Reject legal/front matter, TOC text, generic definitions without operational use, duplicated/noisy extraction, or summaries not supported by evidence.

Candidates:

1. cand_3f6329b2102e7af7: "Zone Group Definition", section 5.4.1, summary: "Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler." Evidence quote matches. This seems like operational knowledge: defining a zone group is part of guideline for system configuration. It is grounded, useful. So valid.

2. cand_6717fd726694cc3c: "Zone Group Independent Schedules and Modes", section 5.4.2, summary: "Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups." Evidence matches. This is operational requirement. Valid.

3. cand_82f58551ead376e2: "Zone Group Mode Consistency", section 5.4.3, summary: "All zones in each Zone Group shall be in the same zone-group operating mode. If one zone enters a mode other than Unoccupied Mode, all zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode." Evidence quote longer but covers summary. Operational rule. Valid.

4. cand_83e7fc9b493b02d2: same section 5.4.3, "Occupied-Standby Mode Not a Zone-Group Mode", summary: "Occupied-standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode, and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode." Evidence matches. This clarifies classification. Operational knowledge. Valid.

5. cand_6f855b4d3655e704: "Occupied Mode Condition - Scheduled Time", section 5.4.6.1, summary: "A Zone Group is in Occupied Mode when the time of day is between the Zone Group's scheduled occupied start and stop times." But evidence quote is just "5.4.6.1. Occupied Mode . A Zone Group is in the Occupied Mode when any of the following is true:" which is incomplete. The summary specifies a condition, but the evidence quote doesn't include that condition. The evidence provided is just the heading. The summary infers one of the conditions listed under 5.4.6.1. However, the evidence quote is insufficient to ground the summary. The summary says "when the time of day is between...", but evidence only states the intro sentence. Likely the actual conditions are enumerated later. Since evidence quote doesn't support the summary, it's unsupported. Reject as unsupported.

6. cand_06aa2460fa51a3ab: "Occupied Mode Condition - Override", same section, summary: "A Zone Group is in Occupied Mode when the schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system." Evidence quote again just the intro sentence. Unsupported. So reject.

Thus: first four valid, last two invalid due to unsupported summary.

Category_if_not: for invalid ones, category is "unsupported". Others null.

JSON response.
